name: CC10X PLAN - Microservices Migration Strategy
description: Comprehensive planning with research and brainstorming for monolith-to-microservices migration

inputs.request: Design a migration strategy to move the user management module from our monolith to a standalone microservice

memory.patterns: Team familiar with Docker, Kubernetes; using event-driven patterns

phases: parallel: research (GitHub patterns, migration guides) + brainstorm (3+ approaches)
create-plan (phased migration with milestones, risks, TDD strategy)
save to docs/plans/ for BUILD continuity
